case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DAVID E. SALAMANCA CARRILO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,427.01 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILO, DAVID E. SALAMANCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DAVID CARRILO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
